headline: SLB Collaborates with Qualcomm on Edge AI Solutions for Energy Operations
summary: HOUSTON, June 09, 2026--Global energy technology company SLB (NYSE: SLB) today announced a memorandum of understanding with Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. to enable edge AI solutions for the energy industry, supporting real-time operational decision-making across wells, facilities and production systems.

headline: SLB OneSubsea Wins Contract for BP's Thunder Horse Deepwater Project
summary: SLB's OneSubsea secures a BP contract for the Thunder Horse project, extending momentum for its subsea boosting technology across multiple offshore projects.

headline: How Investors May Respond To SLB (SLB) Winning bp’s Thunder Horse Subsea Boosting Contract
summary: In late May and early June 2026, SLB announced that its OneSubsea joint venture won an engineering, procurement and construction contract from bp to supply a standardized subsea boosting system for the Thunder Horse deepwater project in the Gulf of Mexico, following earlier awards for bp’s Kaskida and Tiber developments. This cluster of bp contracts underscores how SLB’s standardized subsea technology and execution model are becoming a preferred solution for complex deepwater production and...
